title: Cobblemon Enix
description: A 1.20.1 Cobblemon Fabric Modpack that gives a simple experience with the world of Cobblemon.
body:
# A simple way to experience Cobblemon on Fabric 1.20.1

This modpack was originally created as a way for me and my friend to play together, and I decided to share this modpack with everyone. Please be aware that this pack is not necessarily meant to be anything super extraordinary or impactful, just another way to experience Cobblemon.

## Small Project Size!

This modpack only has around 50+ projects inside, with most being mods. The small size is meant to rely more on the vanilla feel than one might expect, leaving much of the experience to the player.

## Play your way!

The main thing with this pack is meant to be played in a variety of ways without having too many mods that might deter users from playing a certain way. Want to farm and build with [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped 'By Terrarium') in peaceful mode and live your life with Pokemon right beside you? You bet! Want to have an epic adventure in the harder difficulties of fighting monsters, you can do that too! Much of this is up to you and the way you want to play.

## Don't struggle with storage!

The pack provides some storage mods, such as [Extended Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-drawers 'By MattiDragon') and [Inmis](https://modrinth.com/mod/inmis 'By draylar') as to aid you on your adventure. Given how Cobblemon adds quite a few items, this serves as a way to manage your storage much more easily and with little worry.

## Multiplayer!

This pack includes [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc 'By vgskye') to play multiplayer just from LAN! No need to worry as much as using a server host, although you still can if you still feel the need.

## Visual experience!

This pack comes with a few mods that make the experience ever so much more enjoyable. With optimization with [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium 'By jellysquid3'), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium 'By jellysquid3') to mods that make the world look different with [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris 'By coderbot'), you'll hopefully enjoy yourself as you customize it to your needs. There are a few other mods but that is for you to find out.

## Resourcepacks!

This pack also comes with a few resource packs you could use, such as [Fancy Crops](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-crops 'By bebebea_loste') and [Fast Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fast-better-grass 'By robotkoer') to enhance your experience even further.

# Closing Notes

I'm not necessarily the most experienced Minecraft player, but I do want to try my best to make this pack enjoyable for those who want to play Cobblemon without too much of a worry. As always, you can change up the pack as you see fit as Modrinth gives users the resources to do so. This pack will always remain as small as I can keep it, as I know large modpacks aren't everyone's cup of tea.
